name: Easy Pasta Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3-4 cups frozen veggie medley (carrots, broccoli, cauliflower or other combo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the pasta.
2. Defrost the frozen veggies and add them to the cooked pasta.
3. Add the cheese and seasonings (salt, pepper, onion powder, and other spices).
4. Transfer the mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish sprayed with Pam or an equivalent cooking spray.
5. Sprinkle wheat germ liberally over the top.
6. If using, sprinkle lightly with grated Parmesan cheese.
7. Cook in the microwave for 15 minutes.
Note: In Israel, a soft white cheese at .1% fat can be used as a substitute for fat-free white cheese. Alternatively, fat-free cottage cheese could be substituted. Sometimes, the cheese is omitted entirely and canned tomato sauce or soup is used instead.
Makes: 4 to 6 servings
